message:
bd-1q3: implement Lazy<T> wrapper type for deferred loading

Add Lazy<T> type that requires explicit load() call with Session.

Unlike Related<T> (eager loading), Lazy<T> defers fetching until
explicitly requested, enabling N+1 prevention via batch loading.

Features:
- empty(), from_fk(), loaded() constructors
- get(), is_loaded(), is_empty(), fk() accessors
- set_loaded() for batch loading integration
- reset() for refresh after commit
- AtomicBool for thread-safe load tracking
- Serde support for serialization/deserialization
- Clone, Debug, Default implementations

Tests: 19 unit tests covering all states and transitions

Next: Add Session::load_many() for batch loading (N+1 prevention)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
